mapper.select:
/* USE : PosLogCollectMgmtMapper.getSearchStoreList */
SELECT A.HQ_OFFICE_CD , B.HQ_OFFICE_NM , A.STORE_CD , A.STORE_NM , C.POS_NO
FROM TB_MS_STORE A , TB_HQ_OFFICE B , TB_MS_POS C WHERE B.HQ_OFFICE_CD = A.HQ_OFFICE_CD AND C.STORE_CD = A.STORE_CD
AND A.HQ_OFFICE_CD LIKE '%'||#{hqOfficeCd}||'%'
AND B.HQ_OFFICE_NM LIKE '%'||#{hqOfficeNm}||'%'
AND A.STORE_CD LIKE '%'||#{storeCd}||'%'
AND A.STORE_NM LIKE '%'||#{storeNm}||'%'
ORDER BY A.HQ_OFFICE_CD , A.STORE_CD , C.POS_NO
